note: Initial 3-building pilot run on 2026-06-11 to prove the project-name → Tavily → photo pipeline works end-to-end. Photos for the remaining 33 projects ship on the next run with TAVILY_API_KEY set. See scripts/source-listing-photos.mjs.

Chloe Kerrisdale.description: A modern multi-story building with large windows, balconies, and outdoor seating areas, situated on a busy street with pedestrians and parked cars, during a sunset or sunrise.

Current At Water's Edge By Polygon.description: A modern multi-story condo building with large windows and glass balconies situated near a waterway, with a lush green landscape and trees in the background.

Timberlea.description: A tall residential condo building with multiple balconies rises against a bright blue sky with scattered clouds, surrounded by other high-rise buildings and lush greenery at the base.
